intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC诉讼常态化，SEP许可与商标合规趋严
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Litigation Normalizes; SEP & Trademark Compliance Tightens
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年欧洲IP态势呈现司法高效化与合规精细化双重特征。统一专利法院（UPC）案件量激增并确立FRAND裁判新基准，同时PMAC调解机制上线提供多元解纷路径。版权领域明确在线使用公平报酬权，商标审查对声誉关联及恶意注册打击力度加大。企业需适应UPC双轨制诉讼节奏，强化SEP反垄断合规，并警惕跨境营销中的品牌误导风险。
top_signals: UPC发布2025年报并上线PMAC调解系统，替代性争议解决成为专利维权新选项
英高院与UPC在ZTE案中确立以历史可比许可评估FRAND费率的司法逻辑
欧盟法院裁定成员国可立法规定新闻出版者获在线使用公平报酬
德国商标局警示AI驱动的恶意抢注激增，强调无真实使用意图的注册无效
cross_currents: UPC通过快速撤销专利（如瑞德西韦案）与严格临时禁令举证要求，重塑欧洲专利诉讼的成本与证据门槛
从Sisvel Wi-Fi池许可到修订版TTBER指南，标准必要专利（SEP）许可正从诉讼对抗转向基于透明规则的集体谈判
司法机构加强对‘声誉’与‘欺骗’的实质审查，品牌叙事中的历史年份虚构或夸大面临更高的无效风险
implications: 针对UPC诉讼，企业应建立‘无效+FRAND’双轨应对策略，并利用PMAC降低跨国维权成本
出口企业需重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新版TTBER反垄断要求，避免过往低费率协议被认定为sub-FRAND
品牌出海需确保时间标识有实证支撑，建立德国等市场的商标监控机制以防范AI恶意抢注
watchlist: CJEU关于前药是否可独立获SPC保护裁决的最终落地及其对药品专利布局的影响
摩尔多瓦加入EPO后，中国企业一站式获取第40个成员国专利保护的实务操作细节
各成员国将CJEU‘公平报酬’判决转化为国内法的具体时间表及对平台内容分发的实际影响

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定驳回上诉：程序合规与费用担保标准
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Adobe Appeal: Strict Procedural Compliance and Cost Security Standards
report_items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 30, 2026, Order Rejecting Appeal As Inadmissible, UPC_CoA_1/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Adobe诉Keeex案中，裁定驳回上诉并确认程序规则需严格适用以保障法律确定性。法院依职权审查上诉期限，认定驳回裁定未超出请求范围。此外，法院重申原告与被告的相对财务状况不构成Rule 158下的费用担保考量因素。该判决强化了UPC程序规则的刚性，强调避免司法任意性，对后续涉及费用担保及程序合规的案件具有先例约束力。
report_items.summary_en: In the case of Adobe Inc. v. Keeex SAS, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal dismissed the appeal, reinforcing the strict application of procedural rules to ensure legal certainty. The Court conducted an ex officio review of appeal deadlines, confirming that a rejection order for inadmissibility does not exceed the scope of the claims. Furthermore, the judgment reaffirmed established case law stating that the relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant is not a valid criterion under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure for determining cost security. This decision unders...
core_points_zh: 法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则
驳回上诉作为不可受理裁定，不视为超出当事人诉讼请求的范围
当事人相对财务状况不构成申请费用担保的法定依据，维持既往判例立场
core_points_en: The Court strictly reviews appeal deadlines and procedural rules ex officio to uphold legal certainty and prevent discriminatory or arbitrary judicial administration.
An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is legally distinct and does not constitute a decision exceeding the scope of the parties' specific claims.
Relative financial differences between parties do not serve as a statutory basis for cost security adjustments under Rule 158, maintaining consistent prior precedent.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，须严守程序期限，避免因技术性违规导致权利丧失。针对费用担保，不能仅凭双方财力差距抗辩，需准备实质性的胜诉可能性证据。建议加强内部IP合规流程，特别是跨境诉讼中的程序管理，以降低因程序失误带来的高额成本风险。
report_items.insight_en: Litigants before the UPC must prioritize rigorous adherence to procedural timelines and formal requirements, as technical non-compliance can lead to immediate dismissal regardless of substantive merits. Regarding cost security, arguments based solely on financial disparity are unlikely to succeed; instead, parties should focus on demonstrating a strong prima facie case regarding the likelihood of success on the merit...
insight_points_zh: 严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险
费用担保抗辩需侧重胜诉可能性，而非单纯依赖财力对比
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure strict adherence to UPC procedural deadlines to avoid rights forfeiture due to technical violations.
Practice note: Substantiate cost security defenses with evidence of merit rather than relying on comparative financial strength.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 and ex officio admissibility checks in UPC cost security proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟达成禁令：植物基替代品禁用肉类名称
report_items.title_en: EU Agreement Bans Specific Meat Names for Plant-Based Alternatives to Prevent Consumer Misleading
report_items.title: Ban on the use of meat names for plant-based alternatives
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟机构达成协议，禁止在植物基替代产品上使用特定肉类名称（如鸡肉、牛肉），旨在防止消费者被误导并依据《欧盟商标条例》第7条避免注册误导性商标。通用词汇如“汉堡”仍可使用。该禁令可能导致含肉类名称的植物基品牌无法继续使用现有注册商标，迫使供应商修改包装及品牌策略以符合新规。
report_items.summary_en: The European Parliament, Council, and member states have agreed to prohibit the use of specific meat names on plant-based alternatives. This measure aims to prevent consumer confusion and ensure clarity regarding product nature, aligning with Article 7 of the EU Trademark Regulation (EUTMR), which bars registration of marks likely to mislead the public about quality or origin. While generic terms like 'burger' or 'sausage' remain permissible for describing vegetarian products, specific references to animal parts such as chicken, beef, or bacon are now reserved exclusively for actual meat. Cons...
core_points_zh: 欧盟禁止植物基产品使用特定动物部位名称，以防误导公众
依据EUTMR第7条，误导性商标不得注册，现有品牌可能受限
通用描述词如burger允许使用，但需移除具体肉类指代词汇
core_points_en: Specific animal part names like chicken or beef are banned on plant-based products to prevent misleading consumers about the true nature of the goods.
Article 7 of the EUTMR prohibits registering trademarks that mislead the public, potentially invalidating existing brands using restricted meat terminology.
Generic descriptive terms such as burger remain allowed, but specific meat references must be removed from packaging and marketing materials immediately.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧出口植物基食品的中国企业而言，需立即审查现有商标及包装，移除鸡、牛等具体肉类词汇以避免侵权或违规。建议保留burger等通用词，重新设计品牌标识。同时评估现有注册商标的有效性，必要时进行变更或新申请，确保符合欧盟反误导规定，降低法律风险。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants offering plant-based alternatives in the EU must urgently audit their current trademark portfolios and product packaging. Brands utilizing specific meat-related terms risk non-compliance with the new ban, potentially rendering protected marks unusable for their intended goods. Companies should transition to generic descriptors like 'veggie burger' while evaluating the validity of existing registra...
insight_points_zh: 立即审查在欧植物基产品包装，移除具体肉类名称以合规
评估现有含肉类词商标风险，及时调整品牌策略应对禁令
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent review of EU plant-based product packaging is required to remove specific meat names and ensure regulatory compliance.
Practice note: Assess the viability of existing trademarks containing meat terms and adjust brand strategies to avoid infringement or invalidation.
What to monitor: Ongoing enforcement actions by EU authorities regarding the use of prohibited animal-specific terminology in food marketing.

report_items.title_zh: 法律保留与文件保全：如何掌握诉讼主动权
report_items.title_en: Legal Holds and Document Preservation: Securing Early Procedural Advantage
report_items.title: Legal holds and document preservation: How to get on the front foot
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出，在争议早期识别并保存文件证据不仅是最佳实践，更是强制性程序要求。依据《民事诉讼规则》及PD57AD，当当事人知晓可能成为诉讼方时，必须立即采取具体步骤识别并保存相关文件。这包括实施“停止时钟”的数据保留措施。及时且妥善的法律保留能确保在后续收集和审查阶段前完成初步工作，从而在诉讼中占据有利地位，避免因证据灭失而面临不利后果。
report_items.summary_en: Identifying and preserving documentary evidence at the early stages of a dispute is not merely best practice but a mandatory procedural requirement under English law. Although there is no formal definition of a 'legal hold', parties face strict obligations to take specific, timely steps to identify and preserve documents related to actual or potential litigation. This duty arises under the Civil Procedure Rules and Practice Direction 57AD when a party knows it may become involved in proceedings. Immediate 'stop the clock' measures on data are required to prevent automatic deletion or overwriti...
core_points_zh: 法律保留是强制性程序义务，非仅最佳实践，需严格遵守
触发点为知晓可能成为诉讼当事人，须立即启动文件识别与保存
需执行“停止时钟”数据保留，确保早期保全以利于后续举证
core_points_en: Legal holds constitute a mandatory procedural obligation requiring strict compliance rather than serving as optional best practices.
The preservation trigger occurs upon knowledge of potential litigation, necessitating immediate identification and safeguarding of relevant documents.
Implementing 'stop the clock' data retention measures ensures early preservation facilitates effective later evidence collection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对欧洲IP纠纷时，应建立即时响应机制。一旦收到律师函或知悉潜在诉讼，须立即冻结相关电子数据与文档，防止自动覆盖。忽视此程序义务可能导致证据被排除或面临制裁。建议提前制定合规预案，确保在UPC或英国法院诉讼中有效履行披露义务，维护自身合法权益。
report_items.insight_en: Parties facing potential IP disputes in the UK must establish robust internal protocols for immediate document preservation upon receiving notice of potential claims. Failure to implement timely legal holds can result in severe procedural sanctions, including the exclusion of critical evidence. Organizations should integrate these preservation duties into their broader compliance frameworks to ensure readiness for di...
insight_points_zh: 建立即时响应机制，知悉潜在诉讼即冻结相关电子数据
重视程序合规，避免因未履行证据保全义务导致证据失效
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish immediate response mechanisms to freeze electronic data upon awareness of potential litigation risks.
Practice note: Prioritize procedural compliance in evidence preservation to prevent invalidation of key documents due to failure to act.
What to monitor: Ensure alignment with evolving disclosure standards under Practice Direction 57AD and Civil Procedure Rules.

report_items.title_en: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
report_items.summary_zh: 华硕已就Sisvel Wi-Fi多模专利池中的标准必要专利（SEP）获得许可，此举结束了其与华为、飞利浦和Wilus之间的未决专利诉讼。随着华硕的加入，Sisvel进一步巩固了其Wi-Fi 6和Wi-Fi 7标准专利池的地位，现有被许可人包括惠普企业、华为、松下、飞利浦、索尼集团和中兴通讯等。该协议标志着主要电子制造商在SEP许可合规方面的又一进展。

该专利池覆盖Wi-Fi 6及Wi-Fi 7标准，强化行业许可基准
华硕加入后，Sisvel池内包含多家全球顶级电子制造企业
report_items.insight_zh: 此案例表明主流厂商倾向于通过许可而非诉讼解决SEP争议。对在欧中国企业而言，应密切关注Sisvel等NPE的许可条款变化，评估自身SEP风险敞口。建议提前进行FTO分析，并在谈判中参考既有许可协议，以合理成本达成和解，避免高昂的法律成本与市场禁入风险。

report_items.title_en: Taylor Wessing Strengthens German Patent Practice with Key Hires from Eisenführ Speiser
report_items.title: Taylor Wessing bolsters German patent practice with Eisenführ Speiser hires

report_items.summary_en: International law firm Taylor Wessing has announced the recruitment of two new partners from Eisenführ Speiser, effective June 1. This strategic move aims to rebuild its German patent practice team following the significant departure of a large group last autumn. The hires are intended to restore the firm’s former strength and traditional advantages in the German patent sector. Among the new additions is Michael Schneider, who brings over twenty years of experience in patent litigation, with specialized expertise in mobile communications technologies. This personnel change highlights Taylor We...
core_points_zh: Taylor Wessing于6月1日引入两名新合伙人以强化德国专利团队
此举旨在修复去年团队分拆影响，恢复其在德国市场的领先地位
新合伙人Michael Schneider深耕移动通信领域二十余年专利诉讼
core_points_en: Taylor Wessing recruits two new partners on June 1 to significantly strengthen its German patent litigation team capabilities.
The hiring strategy addresses previous team departures, aiming to restore the firm's leading market position in Germany.
New partner Michael Schneider offers over twenty years of specialized patent litigation experience in mobile communications.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国通信企业应关注德国专利诉讼团队变动，特别是具有移动通信背景的资深律师动向。这预示着德国专利诉讼活跃度可能提升，建议提前评估潜在风险，优化在德国市场的IP布局与应诉策略，必要时建立与该类强势律所的合作或预警机制。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants should monitor personnel shifts within top-tier German patent firms, particularly those involving senior litigators with deep telecommunications backgrounds. Such moves often signal increased activity and competitiveness in high-stakes patent litigation sectors. Companies operating in Europe should proactively assess potential litigation risks associated with these evolving legal landscapes. It is...
insight_points_zh: 关注德所人员变动，预判移动通信领域专利诉讼活跃度上升
提前优化在欧IP布局，建立针对资深诉讼专家的应对与合作机制
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor staffing changes at leading German firms to anticipate heightened litigation activity in mobile communications.
Practice note: Proactively refine European IP strategies and defense mechanisms to address potential risks from experienced litigators.
What to monitor: Track the integration of senior specialists into major practices to identify emerging legal threats and partnership opportunities.

report_items.title_zh: 修订版TTBER下技术许可：专利池、FRAND及集体谈判指南更清晰
report_items.title_en: Revised EU TTBER: Enhanced Guidance on Patent Pools, FRAND, and Collective Negotiations
report_items.title: Technology licensing under the revised TTBER: clearer guidance for pools, FRAND and collective negotiations
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会于2026年4月16日通过修订版《技术转移集体豁免条例》(TTBER)及配套指南，将于5月1日生效。新规保留原有安全港结构，但细化了针对专利池、标准必要技术(SEP)许可及集体谈判的合规指导。对于涉及复杂许可模式的企业，需重点评估协议结构以降低反垄断风险，确保符合TFEU第101(3)条要求。
report_items.summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. This new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the established safe harbour structure under Article 101(3) TFEU for agreements meeting market share thresholds and avoiding hardcore restrictions. Significantly, the revised Guidelines provide detailed competition law guidance for modern licensing structures, including technology pools, standard-essential technology (SEP) licensing, data licensing, and licensing negotiatio...
core_points_zh: 修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架
新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导
企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护
core_points_en: The revised TTBER and Guidelines enter into force on 1 May 2026, replacing the previous 2014 regulatory framework.
New provisions offer specific competition law guidance for patent pools, data licensing, and standard-essential technology arrangements.
Companies must optimize complex licensing agreement structures to ensure antitrust compliance and qualify for safe harbour protection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: Stakeholders involved in technology licensing should closely monitor the updated compliance requirements for SEP licensing and patent pool participation, particularly regarding collective negotiation mechanisms. It is advisable to review existing licensing agreements to ensure they do not contain hardcore restrictions that could jeopardize block exemption status. Furthermore, parties should utilize the new Guidelines...
insight_points_zh: 重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新规反垄断合规要求
利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review SEP licensing agreements to align with new antitrust compliance requirements under the revised TTBER.
Practice note: Leverage updated guidelines to optimize participation in patent pools and structure collective negotiation strategies effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving enforcement priorities regarding hardcore restrictions and compliance in complex technology transfer arrangements.

weekly_report.headline_zh: UPC程序收紧，欧盟新规重塑IP合规
weekly_report.headline_en: UPC Tightens Procedure; EU Antitrust and Trademark Rules Reshape Compliance
weekly_report.executive_line: 本周UPC强化程序合规与举证门槛，欧盟修订TTBER及版权判例确立反垄断新基准，植物基商标禁令落地，企业需立即调整许可策略与品牌布局以规避高风险。
weekly_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP战局呈现“司法严管”与“规则重构”双重特征。UPC杜塞尔多夫分院提高临时禁令举证标准并严守程序期限，显著增加维权难度。监管层面，欧盟正式实施植物基产品命名禁令，同时修订版TTBER生效，为SEP许可与专利池提供明确反垄断指引；CJEU裁定忽视使用率的固定版权费率构成滥用支配地位。华硕加入Sisvel专利池标志行业和解趋势。企业需紧急审查商标合规性、优化SEP许可结构并完善证据保全机制。

report_items.title_zh: CJEU裁决请求：前药是否可独立获SPC保护？
report_items.title_en: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.title: Pro = Active? CJEU Asked To Decide
report_items.summary_zh: 爱尔兰律所HGF分析指出，CJEU已受理案件（C-794/25），需裁定已获批活性成分的前药能否独立获得补充保护证书（SPC）。背景涉及武田制药的LDX（右旋安非他命前药）与母药DEX。尽管LDX作为新活性物质获批上市，但法规对前药是否属“同一活性物质”存疑。此裁决将澄清行业争议，解决相关诉讼，明确前药在欧盟的SPC资格标准。
core_points_zh: CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护
争议焦点在于前药是否因安全性或疗效显著不同而视为新活性物质
裁决结果将消除法律不确定性，直接影响欧盟药品专利策略布局
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。

report_items.title_zh: 德国商标申请中的恶意注册：企业日益增长的风险
report_items.title_en: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.title: Bösgläubigkeit (bad faith) in trademark filings: A growing risk for businesses
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析德国商标法中“恶意”（Bösgläubigkeit）概念的应用与风险。德国专利商标局指出，自2025年中以来，针对未注册商标的恶意申请激增，常利用AI工具识别目标并通过电商平台施压。依据《德国商标法》，缺乏真实使用意图且旨在阻碍竞争或获取不当利益的申请将被驳回或宣告无效。该认定需综合评估申请人主观意图与客观情况，受欧盟判例影响显著。
core_points_zh: 德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击
德国商标法规定，无真实使用意图且旨在滥用权利的注册可被驳回或在事后宣告无效
恶意认定需结合主观意图与客观环境综合评估，德国司法实践深受欧盟法院判例影响
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧中国企业而言，应尽早完成核心品牌在德注册以确立权利基础，避免被抢注。同时需建立主动监控机制，警惕竞争对手利用恶意注册通过电商平台快速下架产品。面对此类指控，应积极收集在先使用证据，援引德国商标法关于恶意的规定提起无效宣告请求，维护市场地位。
insight_points_zh: 尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险
遭遇恶意指控时，应积极收集在先使用证据，依法提起无效宣告以维权

report_items.title_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫分院裁定：临时禁令需证明单一产品侵权
report_items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Dismisses Preliminary Injunction: Strict Single-Product Infringement Proof Required
report_items.title: LD Düsseldorf, May 12, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_1747/2025
report_items.summary_zh: UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在2026年5月12日裁决中驳回申请人临时禁令请求。法院强调，申请人须充分证明侵权行为发生的可能性大于不可能性。针对隐形牙套专利，法院认定所有技术特征必须体现在单个产品中，不同阶段的牙套不能组合认定侵权。因申请人仅依赖宣传材料且缺乏具体技术分析，未能满足举证标准，法院未审理有效性等其他抗辩理由。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Local Division in Düsseldorf dismissed an applicant’s request for preliminary injunctions on May 12, 2026. The Court emphasized that applicants must demonstrate with sufficient certainty that infringement is more likely than not. Regarding clear aligner patents, the ruling established that all technical features of a method claim must be embodied within a single product. Consequently, different treatment phases executed by separate aligners cannot be combined to establish infringement. Since the applicant relied exclusively on promotional materials without providing specific technical...
core_points_zh: 申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性
方法权利要求的所有特征必须在单个对齐器中实现，不可跨阶段组合
仅凭宣传材料和推测性证言不足以确立复杂技术领域的侵权事实
core_points_en: Applicants bear the burden of proof in provisional measures, requiring demonstration that infringement is more likely than not.
All method claim features must be realized within a single aligner; features across different treatment stages cannot be aggregated.
Promotional materials and speculative witness statements are insufficient to prove infringement in complex technical fields.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国医疗器械企业出口欧洲时，应警惕UPC对‘单一产品’特征的严格解释。在应对临时禁令指控时，需准备详尽的技术比对分析，避免仅依赖营销材料。建议提前进行FTO分析，确保多阶段治疗方案不落入同一专利的单一产品权利要求范围，以规避高额诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: This decision underscores the UPC’s strict interpretation of 'single product' requirements for multi-stage medical treatments like clear aligner therapy. Parties seeking or defending against preliminary injunctions must prepare detailed, feature-by-feature technical comparisons rather than relying on marketing collateral. For companies operating in Europe, this highlights the necessity of conducting thorough Freedom-...
insight_points_zh: 重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险
完善技术证据链，避免仅凭营销材料应对复杂的专利侵权指控
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Strict adherence to single-product infringement definitions is critical for multi-stage medical device strategies.
Practice note: Develop comprehensive technical evidence chains avoiding reliance on general marketing materials for legal defense.
What to monitor: UPC case law regarding the aggregation of features across distinct treatment phases in method claims.

report_items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
report_items.title_en: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.title: How to plan successful IP mediation
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出调解因高效、保密及商业导向优势，成为解决IP纠纷的优选。WIPO数据显示2025年案件激增42%，中小企业占比高。欧盟层面，EUIPO扩大调解服务范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解中心。调解由中立专家主持，灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供法院无法给予的商业解决方案，有助于建立双赢局面。
core_points_zh: 调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高
EUIPO扩大调解范围，UPC将于2026年设立专利调解仲裁中心
调解灵活处理跨法域冲突，提供超越诉讼的商业双赢方案
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在欧面临IP纠纷时，应优先考虑利用EUIPO及即将成立的UPC调解机制。相比传统诉讼，调解成本更低且能保护商业秘密，尤其适合中小企业。建议提前在合同中加入调解条款，并熟悉WIPO等机构的规则，以灵活应对侵权或许可谈判，避免高昂 litigation 风险。
insight_points_zh: 优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险
建议在合同中预设调解条款，灵活运用ADR解决跨境IP争议

report_items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定驳回上诉：程序合规与费用担保标准
report_items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Rejects Adobe Appeal: Strict Procedural Compliance and Cost Security Standards
report_items.title: Court Of Appeal, April 30, 2026, Order Rejecting Appeal As Inadmissible, UPC_CoA_1/2026
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院在Adobe诉Keeex案中，裁定驳回上诉并确认程序规则需严格适用以保障法律确定性。法院依职权审查上诉期限，认定驳回裁定未超出请求范围。此外，法院重申原告与被告的相对财务状况不构成Rule 158下的费用担保考量因素。该判决强化了UPC程序规则的刚性，强调避免司法任意性，对后续涉及费用担保及程序合规的案件具有先例约束力。
report_items.summary_en: In the case of Adobe Inc. v. Keeex SAS, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) Court of Appeal dismissed the appeal, reinforcing the strict application of procedural rules to ensure legal certainty. The Court conducted an ex officio review of appeal deadlines, confirming that a rejection order for inadmissibility does not exceed the scope of the claims. Furthermore, the judgment reaffirmed established case law stating that the relative financial disparity between claimant and defendant is not a valid criterion under Rule 158 of the Rules of Procedure for determining cost security. This decision unders...
core_points_zh: 法院依职权严格审查上诉期限与程序规则，确保法律确定性及非歧视原则
驳回上诉作为不可受理裁定，不视为超出当事人诉讼请求的范围
当事人相对财务状况不构成申请费用担保的法定依据，维持既往判例立场
core_points_en: The Court strictly reviews appeal deadlines and procedural rules ex officio to uphold legal certainty and prevent discriminatory or arbitrary judicial administration.
An order rejecting an appeal as inadmissible is legally distinct and does not constitute a decision exceeding the scope of the parties' specific claims.
Relative financial differences between parties do not serve as a statutory basis for cost security adjustments under Rule 158, maintaining consistent prior precedent.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对UPC诉讼时，须严守程序期限，避免因技术性违规导致权利丧失。针对费用担保，不能仅凭双方财力差距抗辩，需准备实质性的胜诉可能性证据。建议加强内部IP合规流程，特别是跨境诉讼中的程序管理，以降低因程序失误带来的高额成本风险。
report_items.insight_en: Litigants before the UPC must prioritize rigorous adherence to procedural timelines and formal requirements, as technical non-compliance can lead to immediate dismissal regardless of substantive merits. Regarding cost security, arguments based solely on financial disparity are unlikely to succeed; instead, parties should focus on demonstrating a strong prima facie case regarding the likelihood of success on the merit...
insight_points_zh: 严守UPC程序期限，规避因技术性违规导致的权利丧失风险
费用担保抗辩需侧重胜诉可能性，而非单纯依赖财力对比
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure strict adherence to UPC procedural deadlines to avoid rights forfeiture due to technical violations.
Practice note: Substantiate cost security defenses with evidence of merit rather than relying on comparative financial strength.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 158 and ex officio admissibility checks in UPC cost security proceedings.

report_items.title_zh: 欧盟达成禁令：植物基替代品禁用肉类名称
report_items.title_en: EU Agreement Bans Specific Meat Names for Plant-Based Alternatives to Prevent Consumer Misleading
report_items.title: Ban on the use of meat names for plant-based alternatives
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟机构达成协议，禁止在植物基替代产品上使用特定肉类名称（如鸡肉、牛肉），旨在防止消费者被误导并依据《欧盟商标条例》第7条避免注册误导性商标。通用词汇如“汉堡”仍可使用。该禁令可能导致含肉类名称的植物基品牌无法继续使用现有注册商标，迫使供应商修改包装及品牌策略以符合新规。
report_items.summary_en: The European Parliament, Council, and member states have agreed to prohibit the use of specific meat names on plant-based alternatives. This measure aims to prevent consumer confusion and ensure clarity regarding product nature, aligning with Article 7 of the EU Trademark Regulation (EUTMR), which bars registration of marks likely to mislead the public about quality or origin. While generic terms like 'burger' or 'sausage' remain permissible for describing vegetarian products, specific references to animal parts such as chicken, beef, or bacon are now reserved exclusively for actual meat. Cons...
core_points_zh: 欧盟禁止植物基产品使用特定动物部位名称，以防误导公众
依据EUTMR第7条，误导性商标不得注册，现有品牌可能受限
通用描述词如burger允许使用，但需移除具体肉类指代词汇
core_points_en: Specific animal part names like chicken or beef are banned on plant-based products to prevent misleading consumers about the true nature of the goods.
Article 7 of the EUTMR prohibits registering trademarks that mislead the public, potentially invalidating existing brands using restricted meat terminology.
Generic descriptive terms such as burger remain allowed, but specific meat references must be removed from packaging and marketing materials immediately.
report_items.insight_zh: 对在欧出口植物基食品的中国企业而言，需立即审查现有商标及包装，移除鸡、牛等具体肉类词汇以避免侵权或违规。建议保留burger等通用词，重新设计品牌标识。同时评估现有注册商标的有效性，必要时进行变更或新申请，确保符合欧盟反误导规定，降低法律风险。
report_items.insight_en: Market participants offering plant-based alternatives in the EU must urgently audit their current trademark portfolios and product packaging. Brands utilizing specific meat-related terms risk non-compliance with the new ban, potentially rendering protected marks unusable for their intended goods. Companies should transition to generic descriptors like 'veggie burger' while evaluating the validity of existing registra...
insight_points_zh: 立即审查在欧植物基产品包装，移除具体肉类名称以合规
评估现有含肉类词商标风险，及时调整品牌策略应对禁令
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Urgent review of EU plant-based product packaging is required to remove specific meat names and ensure regulatory compliance.
Practice note: Assess the viability of existing trademarks containing meat terms and adjust brand strategies to avoid infringement or invalidation.
What to monitor: Ongoing enforcement actions by EU authorities regarding the use of prohibited animal-specific terminology in food marketing.

report_items.title_zh: 法律保留与文件保全：如何掌握诉讼主动权
report_items.title_en: Legal Holds and Document Preservation: Securing Early Procedural Advantage
report_items.title: Legal holds and document preservation: How to get on the front foot
report_items.summary_zh: 文章指出，在争议早期识别并保存文件证据不仅是最佳实践，更是强制性程序要求。依据《民事诉讼规则》及PD57AD，当当事人知晓可能成为诉讼方时，必须立即采取具体步骤识别并保存相关文件。这包括实施“停止时钟”的数据保留措施。及时且妥善的法律保留能确保在后续收集和审查阶段前完成初步工作，从而在诉讼中占据有利地位，避免因证据灭失而面临不利后果。
report_items.summary_en: Identifying and preserving documentary evidence at the early stages of a dispute is not merely best practice but a mandatory procedural requirement under English law. Although there is no formal definition of a 'legal hold', parties face strict obligations to take specific, timely steps to identify and preserve documents related to actual or potential litigation. This duty arises under the Civil Procedure Rules and Practice Direction 57AD when a party knows it may become involved in proceedings. Immediate 'stop the clock' measures on data are required to prevent automatic deletion or overwriti...
core_points_zh: 法律保留是强制性程序义务，非仅最佳实践，需严格遵守
触发点为知晓可能成为诉讼当事人，须立即启动文件识别与保存
需执行“停止时钟”数据保留，确保早期保全以利于后续举证
core_points_en: Legal holds constitute a mandatory procedural obligation requiring strict compliance rather than serving as optional best practices.
The preservation trigger occurs upon knowledge of potential litigation, necessitating immediate identification and safeguarding of relevant documents.
Implementing 'stop the clock' data retention measures ensures early preservation facilitates effective later evidence collection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国企业在应对欧洲IP纠纷时，应建立即时响应机制。一旦收到律师函或知悉潜在诉讼，须立即冻结相关电子数据与文档，防止自动覆盖。忽视此程序义务可能导致证据被排除或面临制裁。建议提前制定合规预案，确保在UPC或英国法院诉讼中有效履行披露义务，维护自身合法权益。
report_items.insight_en: Parties facing potential IP disputes in the UK must establish robust internal protocols for immediate document preservation upon receiving notice of potential claims. Failure to implement timely legal holds can result in severe procedural sanctions, including the exclusion of critical evidence. Organizations should integrate these preservation duties into their broader compliance frameworks to ensure readiness for di...
insight_points_zh: 建立即时响应机制，知悉潜在诉讼即冻结相关电子数据
重视程序合规，避免因未履行证据保全义务导致证据失效
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Establish immediate response mechanisms to freeze electronic data upon awareness of potential litigation risks.
Practice note: Prioritize procedural compliance in evidence preservation to prevent invalidation of key documents due to failure to act.
What to monitor: Ensure alignment with evolving disclosure standards under Practice Direction 57AD and Civil Procedure Rules.

report_items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation

report_items.title_zh: 修订版TTBER下技术许可：专利池、FRAND及集体谈判指南更清晰
report_items.title_en: Revised EU TTBER: Enhanced Guidance on Patent Pools, FRAND, and Collective Negotiations
report_items.title: Technology licensing under the revised TTBER: clearer guidance for pools, FRAND and collective negotiations
report_items.summary_zh: 欧盟委员会于2026年4月16日通过修订版《技术转移集体豁免条例》(TTBER)及配套指南，将于5月1日生效。新规保留原有安全港结构，但细化了针对专利池、标准必要技术(SEP)许可及集体谈判的合规指导。对于涉及复杂许可模式的企业，需重点评估协议结构以降低反垄断风险，确保符合TFEU第101(3)条要求。
report_items.summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. This new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the established safe harbour structure under Article 101(3) TFEU for agreements meeting market share thresholds and avoiding hardcore restrictions. Significantly, the revised Guidelines provide detailed competition law guidance for modern licensing structures, including technology pools, standard-essential technology (SEP) licensing, data licensing, and licensing negotiatio...
core_points_zh: 修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架
新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导
企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护
core_points_en: The revised TTBER and Guidelines enter into force on 1 May 2026, replacing the previous 2014 regulatory framework.
New provisions offer specific competition law guidance for patent pools, data licensing, and standard-essential technology arrangements.
Companies must optimize complex licensing agreement structures to ensure antitrust compliance and qualify for safe harbour protection.
report_items.insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
report_items.insight_en: Stakeholders involved in technology licensing should closely monitor the updated compliance requirements for SEP licensing and patent pool participation, particularly regarding collective negotiation mechanisms. It is advisable to review existing licensing agreements to ensure they do not contain hardcore restrictions that could jeopardize block exemption status. Furthermore, parties should utilize the new Guidelines...
insight_points_zh: 重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新规反垄断合规要求
利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Review SEP licensing agreements to align with new antitrust compliance requirements under the revised TTBER.
Practice note: Leverage updated guidelines to optimize participation in patent pools and structure collective negotiation strategies effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving enforcement priorities regarding hardcore restrictions and compliance in complex technology transfer arrangements.

weekly_report.executive_line_en: Stricter UPC evidentiary standards, revised TTBER guidelines, and new plant-based naming bans require immediate adjustments to licensing strategies, brand portfolios, and evidence preservation protocols.
weekly_report.summary_en: This week’s European IP landscape is defined by heightened judicial scrutiny and regulatory restructuring. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Düsseldorf Local Division raised the threshold for preliminary injunctions, demanding precise single-product infringement proof, while the Court of Appeal reinforced strict procedural compliance, increasing litigation risks. Concurrently, the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) entered into force, providing clearer antitrust guidance for Standard Essential Patents (SEPs) and patent pools. The Court of Justice of the EU (CJEU) further established that fixed copyright rates disconnected from actual usage constitute an abuse of dominance. Additionally, the EU implemented a ban on specific meat names for plant-based products, creating immediate trademark compliance obligations. Industry trends show movement toward settlement, exemplified by Asus joining the Sisvel Wi-Fi pool. Companies must urgently review packaging for regulatory violations, optimize SEP licensing structures to align with new safe harbors, and implement robust legal hold mechanisms to meet stringent evidence preservation requirements.
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC focus shifts from substantive examination to strict procedural compliance and evidentiary burdens.
EU competition law boundaries in IP licensing are clarified through the revised TTBER.
Plant-based food trademark compliance moves from industry self-regulation to mandatory legal prohibitions.
next_watch_72h_en: Monitor whether other UPC divisions adopt Düsseldorf’s strict evidentiary standards.
Track EUIPO enforcement actions against existing trademarks violating plant-based naming bans.
Observe subsequent member additions to the Sisvel patent pool and associated rate adjustments.
key_moves_en: Asus signs Sisvel Wi-Fi patent pool license, ending long-standing litigation.
Taylor Wessing hires senior partners to strengthen German mobile communications patent litigation team.
EU mandates compliance with plant-based product de-meatization naming rules.
CJEU establishes antitrust benchmark linking copyright royalties to actual economic value.
business_actions_en: Immediately review EU plant-based product packaging and trademarks to remove specific meat references.
Re-evaluate SEP licensing structures to ensure alignment with revised TTBER antitrust safe harbors.
Implement immediate electronic data retention (Legal Hold) protocols to address strict UPC evidence preservation demands.
watchlist_en: Final CJEU ruling trajectory on prodrug SPC eligibility and its impact on pharmaceutical patent layouts.
Case diversion effects following the 2026 establishment of the UPC Mediation and Arbitration Center.
Further refinement of 'bad faith' determination standards in German judicial practice.
quick_takeaways_en: Procedural errors at the UPC now carry severe consequences, including dismissal of appeals.
Antitrust compliance is central to structuring valid SEP and patent pool agreements under new TTBER.
Brand protection requires active defense against AI-accelerated bad faith filings and strict label compliance.
rising_themes_en: Strict UPC procedural compliance and evidentiary burdens
Defense against AI-driven bad faith trademark registrations
cooling_themes_en: Purely theoretical patent validity disputes (shifting toward pragmatic procedural issues)
Traditional fixed-rate models in collective copyright management
regional_shift_en: Focus shifts to the UPC Düsseldorf Local Division, whose rulings are shaping union-wide litigation standards.
Increased regulatory intensity at the EU level, with member state execution details, such as in Germany, becoming focal points.
strategic_implications_en: European IP strategies must adjust from 'litigation-oriented' to a dual track of 'compliance + mediation'.
SEP holders need to redesign licensing models to avoid accusations of abusing market dominance.
Global brands must establish dynamic compliance review mechanisms, particularly for emerging food and digital service sectors.

transcript_lines_zh: 今天是2026年5月20日。以下是今天欧洲 IP 圈最重要的几条变化。
先看第一条，CJEU受理前药SPC资格案，需裁定前药能否独立于母药获保护。后续要看欧洲层面会不会出现进一步官方动作或配套安排。
再看第二条，德国专利商标局警示恶意商标申请激增，多利用AI识别未注册标志进行策略性阻击。值得关注的是，尽早完成德国商标注册并建立监控机制，防范恶意抢注带来的电商下架风险。
再看第三条，申请人承担临时禁令侵权举证责任，需证明侵权可能性大于不可能性。值得关注的是，重视UPC对单一产品特征比对的严格要求，避免跨阶段组合侵权风险。
最后看第四条，调解具高效保密优势，WIPO案件量增42%，中小企参与度高。值得关注的是，优先利用EUIPO及UPC调解机制降低在欧维权成本与风险。
总结来看，今天的欧洲 IP 动态仍然围绕专利、商标、SEP标准必要专利展开，接下来值得继续关注CJEU关于前药SPC资格裁决的最终结果及其对药品专利策略的影响。

topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，UPC发布年报并上线PMAC调解系统，强化ADR机制。司法实践趋严：杜塞尔多夫分院明确临时禁令举证标准及单一产品侵权认定；上诉法院厘清撤诉、期限起算等程序规则。等同原则适用更谨慎，功能性限定解释扩大保护范围。企业需适应高效诉讼节奏，优化在欧专利布局与风险应对策略。
key_points: PMAC程序规则获批且系统上线，官方调解仲裁渠道正式打通，为SEP/FRAND纠纷提供低成本替代方案。
司法裁判趋严：临时禁令需证明单一产品特征全覆盖，禁止跨阶段组合；功能性限定词可独立构成直接侵权。
程序合规红线收紧：上诉期自附理由判决日起算，登录系统不视为应诉；逾期证据可采性受严格审查。
actions: 优先利用PMAC及EUIPO调解机制解决争议，降低维权成本；在合同中预设ADR条款以掌握主动权。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: Standard-Essential Patent (SEP) litigation is undergoing significant structural shifts, driven by recent judicial developments in Europe and the UK. Courts are increasingly validating arbitration-linked licensing offers as compliant with FRAND obligations, altering traditional dispute resolution pathways. Simultaneously, Non-Practicing Entities are leveraging the Unified Patent Court to intensify enforcement pressures across multiple jurisdictions. Key rulings clarify that implementers must demonstrate immediate willingness to license to preserve defenses against injunctions, while procedural adjustments in confidentiality regimes and preliminary objections are reshaping litigation tactics. These trends highlight a move toward contractual certainty and aggressive venue selection, requiring stakeholders to adapt their negotiation and compliance strategies to mitigate risks associated with...
key_points_en: UK courts recognize adjustable licenses with ICC arbitration clauses as valid RAND offers, risking loss of court access for implementers refusing such terms.
Non-Practicing Entities increasingly utilize the Unified Patent Court to escalate SEP enforcement, treating litigation as a core business model across Europe.
UPC rulings confirm that dominant positions may arise if standard-compliant products cannot be marketed without specific patent licenses, emphasizing implementer willingness.
